core.generalErrorMessage: Something went wrong, please check the configuration
core.title: Core Settings
deleteNode.prompt: Are you sure you want to delete the {{name}} node?
deleteNode.title: Delete Node
deleteUser.prompt: Are you sure you want to delete {{username}}?
deleteUser.title: Delete User
hostsDialog.dataLimit: The usage limit of the user
hostsDialog.dataUsage: The current usage of the user
hostsDialog.desc: Use these variables to make it dynamic
hostsDialog.fragment.info.attention: Attention: currently, this feature only supported in streisand >= 1.6.12 and v2rayNG >= 1.8.16 (custom config)
hostsDialog.noise.info.attention: Attention: currently, this feature only supported in streisand >= 1.6.32 and v2rayNG >= 1.8.39 (custom config)
hostsDialog.host.info: By default, if a request host is set in the Xray config, this host is used. However, you can set a custom request host here if needed.
hostsDialog.host.multiHost: To set multiple addresses, separate them with <badge>,</badge> Each time an address is chosen randomly.
hostsDialog.host.wildcard: Use <badge>*</badge> to generate a random string (works for wildcard domain names)
hostsDialog.jalaliExpireDate: Expiry date of the user in solar calendar
hostsDialog.path.info: Set a path for host users, useful behind a reverse proxy.
hostsDialog.port.info: By default, a host uses the default port of the inbound. You can set a custom port in case this host is a server that forwards traffic from a port that differs from your server's port. For example, the server may forward traffic from port 8443 to the default port of your inbound server.
hostsDialog.proxyOutbound.info: Extra outbound ( only in v2ray custom config )
hostsDialog.security.info: If the middleware server of this host uses a different security layer than the inbound's default, you can set a custom security layer here.
hostsDialog.sni.info: By default, a host uses the default SNI of the inbound. You can set a custom SNI in case this host is a server that has a different SNI. For example, the server may receive traffic with a different SSL certificate, perform SSL termination, and forward it to your inbound server.
hostsDialog.title: Using this setting, you are able to assign specific address for each inbound.
login.welcomeBack: Welcome back, please enter your details
nodes.addHostForEveryInbound: Add this node as a new host for every inbound
nodes.connection-hint: To setup a Marzban Node, you need to set this certificate on the node to initialize a secure connection between main server and the node
nodes.title: Using Marzban-Node, you are able to scale up your connection quality by adding different nodes on different servers.
resetAllUsage.error: Usage reset failed, please try again.
resetAllUsage.prompt: This action clears all of the users' data usage completely. Are you sure you want to reset all usage? THIS CANNOT BE UNDONE!
resetAllUsage.title: Reset data usage for all users
resetUserUsage.error: Usage reset failed, please try again.
resetUserUsage.prompt: Are you sure you want to reset {{username}}'s usage?
resetUserUsage.title: Reset User Usage
revokeUserSub.error: Subscription revoke failed, please try again.
revokeUserSub.prompt: Are you sure you want to revoke {{username}}'s subscription?
revokeUserSub.title: Revoke User Subscription
userDialog.selectOneProtocol: Please select at least one protocol
userDialog.shadowsocksDesc: Fast and secure, but not efficient as others
userDialog.warningNoProtocol: Please select at least one protocol
usersTable.noUser: There is no user added to the system
usersTable.noUserMatched: It seems there is no user matched with what you are looking for
usersTable.mgma: Get a temporary MGMA subscription link
mgma.title: MGMA Temporary Subscription
mgma.securityNotice: This link is shown only in this window and is cleared when it expires or you close the window. Anyone who obtains it can use it until it expires.
mgma.issueError: Could not generate a temporary link. Check the user status and security settings, then try again.
mgma.revokeError: Could not revoke the temporary link. Please try again.
mgma.qrNotice: This QR code contains only the temporary subscription link.
mgma.expired: This temporary link has expired and was cleared from the panel.
mgma.noActiveLink: There is no active temporary link.
mgma.unavailableForStatus: Temporary links are available only for active or on-hold users
subscriptionSecurity.title: Subscription Security
subscriptionSecurity.loadError: Could not load subscription security settings.
subscriptionSecurity.saveError: Could not save subscription security settings.
subscriptionSecurity.pepperMissing: MGMA_TOKEN_PEPPER is not configured. Dual and ephemeral modes cannot be enabled safely.
subscriptionSecurity.modeHelp.legacy: Existing permanent subscription links remain available.
subscriptionSecurity.modeHelp.dual: Existing links and MGMA temporary links are both accepted during migration.
subscriptionSecurity.modeHelp.ephemeral: Only MGMA temporary links are accepted; existing permanent links return 404.
subscriptionSecurity.ttlHelp: Allowed range: 30 to 900 seconds. Recommended: 180 seconds.
subscriptionSecurity.ttlError: The lifetime must be between 30 and 900 seconds.
subscriptionSecurity.singleUseHelp: Consume the token when the first request passes all validation.
subscriptionSecurity.singleUseWarning: Some clients send retries or multiple format requests. Single-use mode can make a valid import fail.
subscriptionSecurity.customCidrsHelp: Enter one IPv4 or IPv6 CIDR per line; commas and spaces are also accepted. This may be empty in China-or-custom mode.
subscriptionSecurity.cidrRequired: Add at least one custom CIDR for this source mode.
portal.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your plan and subscription
portal.registerSubtitle: Public registration is closed. A valid administrator-issued invitation is required.
portal.registrationUnavailable: The invitation is invalid, inactive, not yet valid, expired or exhausted.
portal.accessDenied: This source IP is blocked. Contact an administrator if this is unexpected.
portal.mgmaUnavailable: A temporary link is unavailable for the current subscription
portal.purchaseOverwriteWarning: This purchase will replace the current plan, expiry and remaining traffic. Continue?
portal.overviewSubtitleActive: Your subscription is running normally. Everything important is collected here.
portal.overviewSubtitleOnHold: Your plan is ready. Its active period starts with your first connection.
portal.overviewSubtitleInactive: Your current subscription is unavailable. Check its expiry date or choose a new plan.
portal.overviewSubtitleEmpty: Choose a plan to start using the subscription service.
portal.noPlanHelp: Your current plan and expiry date will appear here after purchase.
portal.trafficUsageHelp: Traffic used during the current plan period.
portal.storeSubtitle: Choose the traffic allowance and duration that fit you. Plans activate immediately.
portal.planDefaultDescription: A stable, straightforward subscription for everyday use.
portal.confirmPurchaseDescription: Pay {{price}} for “{{plan}}”. This replaces your current plan, expiry date, and remaining traffic.
portal.accessSubtitle: Create a short-lived subscription address when you need it and revoke it at any time.
portal.temporaryLinkNotice: For your security, temporary subscriptions are not saved in this browser. Create a new one after leaving this page.
portal.temporaryLinkHelp: The link expires with the timer and can be revoked sooner.
portal.accessPlanHelp: An active plan is required before you can create temporary access.
portal.walletHelp: Use your balance to purchase plans. Contact an administrator to add funds.
portal.walletHistoryHelp: Review every balance change in chronological order.
portal.loadErrorTitle: The customer portal could not be loaded
portal.loadErrorDescription: The service may be temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly or contact an administrator if this continues.
portal.dataLoadError: Data could not be loaded. The content shown may be out of date.
commerce.title: Users and Plans
commerce.subtitle: Manage plan visibility, balances and the single active subscription
commerce.invalidPlan: Complete all plan fields and select at least one node
commerce.noAccounts: No portal accounts have registered yet
commerce.invitationShownOnce: Copy this code now. Only its digest is stored and the plaintext will not be shown again.
commerce.invitationInvalid: Enter a valid invitation usage limit
commerce.invitationExpiryRequired: Scheduled invitations require an expiry time
commerce.autoBlockHelp: Portal login, administrator login, invalid invitations and malformed registration requests are counted by source IP. Successful authentication clears that flow's counter.
commerce.blockFieldsRequired: Enter an IP/CIDR and a reason
